Add skim milk, oil and vanilla

samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 together
2. Grease and flour 9 x 13-inch pan
3. Sift flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt into
4. large bowl
5. In another bowl, beat eggs
6. Add skim milk, oil and vanilla
7. Beat until smooth
8. Stir in water water
9. Pour into prepared pan
10. Bake 40 minutes
11. or until toothpick inserted near center comes out clean
12. Turn onto serving plate
13. Dust with sugar

samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:

2. Set aside
3. In bowl, combine remaining ingredients and add dry mixture
4. Mix well
5. Bake in preheated waffle iron

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
Make a small well, in one corner
In a small bowl, whisk together eggs and milk
Add to water and, stirring constantly, until smooth
Bake for 35 minutes or until cake tests done
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Grease a 9x13-inch pan
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
4. Make a small well, in one corner
5. In a small bowl, whisk together eggs and milk
6. Pour into well with flour
7. Add oil and vanilla
8. Add to water and, stirring constantly, until smooth
9. Pour into prepared pan
10. Bake for 35 minutes or until cake tests done

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In a 9x13" baking or baking dish
In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
In a medium bowl, whisk eggs
Add milk and oil vanilla, beat until smooth
Pour boiling water over batter, sprinkle with cocoa powder swirl through with a knife
Bake for 40 minutes, or until toothpick inserted in center comes out almost clean
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven, 350
2. In a 9x13" baking or baking dish
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
4. In a medium bowl, whisk eggs
5. Add milk and oil vanilla, beat until smooth
6. Pour into baking pan
7. Pour boiling water over batter, sprinkle with cocoa powder swirl through with a knife
8. Bake for 40 minutes, or until toothpick inserted in center comes out almost clean
